name: zdeclient_clear_feature_entries_and_map_tree
description: zDEClient::ClearFeatureEntriesAndMapTree clears the active feature-entry vector and erases the feature map tree.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ClearFeatureEntriesAndMapTree@zDEClient@@YAHXZ at 0x457ae0 still fails: 66 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes masked, 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 88 bytes, VC object symbol size 64 bytes.

Reviewed difference is source-shape drift from the original vector erase/copy scaffold around clearing feature entries; current source directly resets g_zDEClient_FeatureListEnd to g_zDEClient_FeatureListBegin and then erases the map tree. The native smoke verifies feature-list reset and map-tree header/count reset.
